title: scopella marginata var. penangense
intro: Scopella marginata var. penangense is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scopella marginata var. penangense include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
